[[File:Secret Histories.svg|thumb]]
Enlensing is the antidote to [[absurdity]].

It is a process of integrating disparate worldviews by ways of oscillating between [[overseer]] and [[underseer]].

Successful enlensing induces laughter.

== Further reading ==
https://www.meaningcrisis.co/episode-9-insight/ 
[[Category:Enlensing]]
[[sn:Enlensing]][[Category:Absurdity]]
[[sn:Enlensing]][[Category:Ninefold vaccine]]
[[sn:Enlensing]][[Category:Booster shots]]
[[Category:Sacredness]]
==In Catgirl Simulator==
The Enlensing aspect in Catgirl Simulator corresponds to one of the Nine Aspects. This system, a retrofitting of the aspect system from the Cultist Simulator, relates to the Ninefold Vaccine. It specifically refers to the Absurdity Vaccine and Secret Histories Aspect. Enlensing tackles the Absurdity of life by allowing a reframing of perspectives, seeking hidden meanings, and approaching life's mysteries with a fresh lens.
====Lore Elements====
The aspect includes 12 lore elements:

A Lensmaker's Secret (fragmentsecrethistories): The truth is often elusive, hidden behind layers of deception and misconception. But through the lens of careful scrutiny, the obscured becomes clear.

The Revelation of Focus (fragmentsecrethistoriesb): The most profound truths often lie in plain sight, concealed only by our inability to perceive them. By applying the right lens, these truths are brought into sharp focus.

An Optical Odyssey (fragmentsecrethistoriesc): The journey to discern truth is a path laden with distortions and illusions. It's an odyssey through a world that can shift and change under different lenses.

Focus of the Fact-seeker (fragmentsecrethistoriesd): In the realm of truth, perspective is paramount. The Fact-seeker understands this, manipulating the lens to filter bias and distortion.

Prism's Perspective (fragmentsecrethistoriese): Truth, like light through a prism, can split into a spectrum of interpretations. Understanding this, the seeker knows to explore each aspect, each color of the spectrum.

Observation's Oracle (fragmentsecrethistoriesf): One's ability to perceive the world is an oracle in itself, predicting our understanding of reality. When one learns to adjust their lens, the world unravels its secrets.

The Refraction Narrative (fragmentsecrethistoriesg): Every truth-seeker has a narrative, a tale of discovery and revelation, of truths uncovered and mysteries solved. These narratives are shaped by the lens they use.
====Influence Levels====
The aspect also has 4 influence levels:

Whispered Perspectives (influencesecret): A soft murmur of new viewpoints, the process of Enlensing begins. Reframing perspectives counters Absurdity. Can be used in rites to summon certain entities.

Glimpse of Hidden Meanings (influencesecretc): Deeper truths surface, Absurdity fades beneath the power of Enlensing. The revelation of hidden truths grows. Useful in rites to summon specific entities.

Secrets Revealed (influencesecrete): The world shifts under the force of Enlensing, Absurdity retreats. A revelation of profound, obscured truths. This influence can be used in rites to summon powerful entities.

Unveiling of the Arcane (influencesecretg): The veil of Absurdity lifts completely, Enlensing reigns supreme. This might be the culmination of Enlensing. Strong enough to summon the most potent entities.
====Books====
A minimum of 12 books are associated with this aspect, one for each lore level:

Meditations by Marcus Aurelius (booksecrethistoriesa): Marcus Aurelius' personal writings, offering ideas on Stoic philosophy.

The Extended Phenotype: The Long Reach of the Gene by Richard Dawkins (booksecrethistoriesb): Dawkins extends the influential concept of the gene to explore evolution from the lens of the gene itself.

On the Origin of Species by Charles Darwin (booksecrethistoriesc): The seminal work that introduced the scientific theory of evolution and natural selection.

The World as Will and Representation by Arthur Schopenhauer (booksecrethistoriesd): Schopenhauer's work presents a pessimistic picture of existence, with both the will and representation determining our reality.

Naming and Necessity by Saul Kripke (booksecrethistoriese): Kripke's influential lectures, which revolutionized the philosophy of language.

Monadology by Leibnitz (booksecrethistoriesf): Leibniz’s attempt to reconcile his personal philosophical system with his orthodox Christian beliefs.

Ethics by Baruch Spinoza (booksecrethistoriesg.1): Spinoza's vision of the ideal human condition and the path to achieving it.

Critique of Pure Reason by Immanuel Kant (booksecrethistoriesg.2): Kant's exploration into metaphysics and epistemology.

Phenomenology of Spirit by Georg Wilhelm Friedrich Hegel (booksecrethistoriesg.3): Hegel's complex exploration of human consciousness and its development through stages of self-awareness.

These components help form a cohesive and comprehensive understanding of the Enlensing aspect within Catgirl Simulator.
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
